data.task: Fetch all overdue invoices and send a chase email for each one. Match the tone to the chase stage based on days overdue. Write in the customer's language.

data.output:
[
  {
    "invoice_number": "INV-2026-003",
    "customer_name": "QuickShop Ltd",
    "customer_email": "billing@quickshop.example.com",
    "customer_code": "QS001",
    "amount": 8500.0,
    "amount_net": 7024.79,
    "currency": "EUR",
    "due_date": "2026-02-08",
    "days_overdue": 35,
    "description": "Maintenance contract \u2014 monthly",
    "language": "en"
  },
  {
    "invoice_number": "INV-2026-002",
    "customer_name": "TechCorp GmbH",
    "customer_email": "finance@techcorp.example.com",
    "customer_code": "TC001",
    "amount": 12800.0,
    "amount_net": 10743.7,
    "currency": "EUR",
    "due_date": "2026-03-01",
    "days_overdue": 14,
    "description": "Software license renewal",
    "language": "de"
  },
  {
    "invoice_number": "INV-2026-001",
    "customer_name": "BuildRight BV",
    "customer_email": "accounts@buildright.example.com",
    "customer_code": "BR001",
    "amount": 4250.0,
    "amount_net": 3512.4,
    "currency": "EUR",
    "due_date": "2026-03-13",
    "days_overdue": 2,

    "language": "nl"
  }
]

input.subject: Vriendelijke herinnering: Betaling factuur INV-2026-001
input.body:
Hallo,

Ik schrijf je met een vriendelijke herinnering over de volgende factuur:

**Factuurnummer:** INV-2026-001
**Bedrag:** €4.250,00
**Vervaldatum:** 13 maart 2026

Deze factuur is nu enkele dagen vervallen. Zou je deze alsjeblieft binnenkort kunnen betalen?

Dank je wel voor je aandacht en samenwerking!

Met vriendelijke groeten,
AI Agency Test BV
finance@aiagency.example.com
+31612345678

input.subject: Zahlungserinnerung: Rechnung INV-2026-002
input.body:
Sehr geehrte Damen und Herren,

Ich schreibe Ihnen bezüglich der folgenden Rechnung, deren Zahlungsfrist inzwischen verstrichen ist:

**Rechnungsnummer:** INV-2026-002
**Betrag:** €12.800,00
**Fälligkeitsdatum:** 1. März 2026

Könnten Sie uns bitte mitteilen, bis wann Sie die Zahlung leisten können? Falls bereits eine Zahlung eingeleitet wurde, bitten wir um Verständnis für diese Erinnerung.

Sollten Sie Fragen zur Rechnung haben, stehe ich gerne zur Verfügung.

Mit freundlichen Grüßen,
AI Agency Test BV
finance@aiagency.example.com
+31612345678

input.subject: FINAL NOTICE: Outstanding Invoice INV-2026-003 - Immediate Payment Required
input.body:
Dear QuickShop Ltd,

We must bring to your immediate attention a significantly overdue invoice that remains unpaid:

**Invoice Number:** INV-2026-003
**Amount:** €8.500,00
**Original Due Date:** 8 February 2026
**Days Overdue:** 35

This invoice is now 35 days past due, and we have sent previous reminders regarding this matter. We require immediate settlement of this outstanding balance.

Please arrange payment without further delay. If there are circumstances preventing payment or if you have concerns about this invoice, contact us immediately at finance@aiagency.example.com or +31612345678.

We appreciate your urgent attention to this matter.

Regards,
AI Agency Test BV
finance@aiagency.example.com
+31612345678
